permittedDifferences.rationale: Root canonical backend adds a test-only v1 protocol fixture module; it does not add runtime protocol variants or handlers.
The root protocol module only exports the test-only v1 contract fixture module; runtime wire types remain unchanged.
Documentation differs to describe the canonical contract/parity baseline and has no runtime effect.

notes: Differences are not permitted by the stage-1 baseline except the explicitly documented test-only contract fixture and documentation checksum differences above. Secret values are never emitted; only environment key names and default presence are compared. Runtime, migration, route, protocol, and environment key/default differences remain fail-closed.
